entities.name: BLACK GRAM
entities.description: A highly nutritious legume crop primarily cultivated for its grains in Asian countries.

entities.name: ASIAN COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions where black gram is primarily cultivated.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation of genetic characteristics in a population, crucial for maximizing production potential.

entities.name: GERMPLASM ACCESSIONS
entities.description: Specific samples of genetic material evaluated for quantitative and qualitative traits.

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAITS
entities.description: Measurable characteristics including grain yield and related attributes.

entities.name: QUALITATIVE TRAITS
entities.description: Descriptive characteristics such as plant growth, leaf structure, branching pattern, and pod morphology.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced, a key quantitative trait for productivity.

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH
entities.description: A qualitative trait evaluated in black gram germplasm.

entities.name: LEAF STRUCTURE
entities.description: A qualitative trait evaluated in black gram germplasm.

entities.name: BRANCHING PATTERN
entities.description: A qualitative trait evaluated in black gram germplasm.

entities.name: POD MORPHOLOGY
entities.description: A qualitative trait evaluated in black gram germplasm.

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: A statistical measure used to estimate the proportion of phenotypic variation due to genetic factors.

entities.name: GENETIC ADVANCE
entities.description: The expected genetic gain in the next generation as a percentage of population means.

entities.name: PDM
entities.description: A quantitative trait showing high heritability and genetic advance.

entities.name: GYPP
entities.description: Grain yield per plant, a quantitative trait used for evaluation.

entities.name: PPP
entities.description: Pods per plant, a quantitative trait used for evaluation.

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COMPONENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to identify associations between traits.

entities.name: CORRELATION ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to determine the relationship between traits.

entities.name: PDL
entities.description: Pod length, a trait showing strong association with grain yield per plant.

entities.name: PSD
entities.description: A trait showing strong association with grain yield per plant.

entities.name: PDPP
entities.description: A trait showing strong association with grain yield per plant.

entities.name: DAYS TO MATURITY
entities.description: A trait showing a negative association with grain yield.

entities.name: INSECT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand insect pests.

entities.name: POD AND LEAF PUBESCENCE
entities.description: Physical characteristics associated with insect tolerance.

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand water scarcity.

entities.name: LANCEOLATE LEAVES
entities.description: Physical characteristics associated with drought tolerance.

entities.name: HEAT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand high temperatures.

entities.name: CENTRAL BRANCHING
entities.description: Physical characteristics associated with heat tolerance.

entities.name: YELLOW MOSAIC DISEASE
entities.description: A disease for which resistance is characterized in black gram germplasm.

entities.name: URDBEAN
entities.description: Another common name for black gram.
